caseSummaryText.title: Case Summary Text
caseSummaryText.description: A formatted, numbered list of the matching open risk cases, each with customer, score, and status.

returnedCaseCount.title: Returned Case Count
returnedCaseCount.description: How many cases are included in the Case Summary Text.

totalOpenCases.title: Total Open Cases
totalOpenCases.description: The total count of open cases matching the filter, which may be higher than Returned Case Count if capped.
